article.body_preview:
DHAKA, May 22, 2023 (BSS) - The United States (US) today hailed Bangladesh's decision as Bangladesh Government has relaxed the mandatory on-arrival fumigation requirements of US cotton.

Effective on May 16, 2023, US cotton can arrive in Bangladesh without fumigation at the port of entry, a media release issued by the US embassy said here.

In this connection US Ambassador in Dhaka Peter Haas said, "Working together with Bangladesh to solve this issue is a great example of how our two countries

llm_connections.evidence_quote: Bangladesh needs high-quality US cotton to fuel its growth and increase foreign exchange earnings
llm_connections.scope_justification: The quote refers to increasing Bangladesh's foreign exchange earnings (country-level export earnings), which falls within the national imports/exports scope of balance_of_trade.

verification.quote_best_match: Bangladesh needs high-quality US cotton to fuel its growth and increase foreign exchange earnings,
verification.judge_reasoning: The exact sentence appears in the article. The ambassador explicitly links US cotton to 'fuel its growth and increase foreign exchange earnings,' asserting a cause-effect relationship, and this refers to Bangladesh's national-level foreign exchange earnings.
